epigraph.quote: It was glorious - like a bath in Crème de Menthe, the water was chalky + cold + my skin felt soft.

moments.quote: My duck was a bit raw, as was Simon's, but Simon said that's the way the French cook it + he thought it tasted good.
The town is famous for its row of Roman columns + its olive oil, from trees planted by the Romans 100 BC.
He vowed that if he got home to Moustiers again, he'd hang a star on a chain between the cliffs over the high-up chapel... + he did.

images.caption: MOUSTIERS Ste-MARIE cité de la faïence

moments.quote: It was fabulous, canoeing - lots of rapids ~ Simon + Eve didn't tip up, but John did + Charles did when he fought with John.

images.caption: The Drôme, a river for every body – canoe kayak leaflet

moments.quote: 5 horses are looking at us over the fence. The mountains around feel very protective.

images.caption: Musée de la Résistance Départemental en Vercors

moments.quote: went for a swim in the fabulously clean pool (fed from the source) quite cold, but the sun had heated it.

images.caption: Piscine de St-Jean-de-Vaux, Carte d'Abonnement 12 Entrées

moments.quote: Lovely tiled rooves. Beautiful altar-piece by Roger Van der Weyden.
After supper I saw an old lady walking by the river who went to sit on a bench. I sat next to her + we chatted.
It was modelled on one in Manchester, & was built in the tradition of the Statue of Liberty & the Eiffel Tower.
